data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding the cancellation of follow-up appointments. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the system prevents cancellation without doctor approval, as it only mentions that a patient receives a message when attempting to cancel. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no concrete evidence demonstrating the enforcement of this rule in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence that follow-up appointments cannot be cancelled without doctor approval.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
